---
title: "Alina Markova"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
:root {
  --accent: #D4537E;
  --muted: #8a8a8a;
  --border: #e4e4e4;
  --text: #1a1a1a;
}

#title-block-header { display: none !important; }

.page-wrap {
  max-width: 860px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 3rem 1.5rem 5rem;
}

/* ── HERO ── */
.hero {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 3.5rem;
  padding-bottom: 3rem;
}

.headshot {
  width: 160px;
  height: 160px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  object-fit: cover;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  display: block;
}

.hero-headline {
  font-size: 1.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.4;
  color: var(--text);
  margin: 0 0 1rem;
}

.accent { color: var(--accent); }

.hero-bio {
  color: #5a5a5a;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.75;
  margin: 0 0 1.75rem;
}

.cta-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.btn {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.55rem 1.3rem;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  border-radius: 4px;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.btn:hover { opacity: 0.82; text-decoration: none; }

.btn-primary {
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  border: 1px solid var(--accent);
}

.btn-outline {
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--accent);
  border: 1px solid var(--accent);
}

/* Stat grid */
.stat-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}

.stat-box {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 1.1rem 1.25rem;
}

.stat-number {
  display: block;
  font-size: 1.6rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--text);
  line-height: 1.2;
}

.stat-label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-top: 0.25rem;
  line-height: 1.4;
}

/* Skill chips */
.chip-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.4rem;
}

.chip {
  border: 1px solid var(--accent);
  color: var(--accent);
  background: transparent;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  padding: 0.22rem 0.75rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

/* ── DIVIDER ── */
.section-hr {
  border: none;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  margin: 3rem 0;
}

/* ── SECTION LABEL ── */
.section-label {
  font-size: 11px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-weight: 600;
  margin: 0 0 1.75rem;
}

/* ── TIMELINE ── */
.timeline-entry {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 140px 1fr;
  gap: 1.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 2.25rem;
}

.tl-date {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  line-height: 1.6;
  padding-top: 0.15rem;
}

.tl-role {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text);
  margin: 0 0 0.15rem;
}

.tl-org {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
}

.tl-desc {
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  color: #5a5a5a;
  line-height: 1.65;
  margin: 0;
}

/* ── NOW CARD ── */
.now-card {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 1.5rem;
}

.now-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.now-live {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.4rem;
}

.live-dot {
  width: 8px;
  height: 8px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--accent);
  display: inline-block;
  animation: pulse 2s infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
  0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
  50% { opacity: 0.4; }
}

.live-label {
  font-size: 10px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-weight: 700;
}

.now-date-badge {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 0.15rem 0.65rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
}

.now-project {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--text);
  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
}

.now-subtitle {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}

.now-fields {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 1.25rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}

.now-field-label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 10px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
}

.now-field-value {
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: #5a5a5a;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.now-tags {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.35rem;
}

.now-tag {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  padding: 0.2rem 0.65rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  color: var(--muted);
  background: transparent;
}

.now-tag.accent-tag {
  border-color: var(--accent);
  color: var(--accent);
}

/* ── ARCHIVE TABLE ── */
.archive-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
}

.archive-table th {
  font-size: 10px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-weight: 600;
  text-align: left;
  padding: 0.6rem 1rem 0.6rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.archive-table td {
  padding: 0.7rem 1rem 0.7rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  color: var(--text);
  font-size: 0.875rem;
}

.archive-table .archive-tags {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.8rem;
}

@media (max-width: 680px) {
  .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2rem; }
  .timeline-entry { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 0.35rem; }
  .now-fields { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
</style>

<div class="page-wrap">

  <!-- HERO -->
  <div class="hero">
    <div>
      <img src="images/Alina_Headshot.JPG" class="headshot" alt="Alina Markova">
      <p class="hero-headline">I study business analytics at UCSD because <span class="accent">I want to understand people through data,</span> not instead of them.</p>
      <p class="hero-bio">Great seeing you here! You can find information about my background, experience, and projects. Feel free to explore and learn more about me. If you have any questions or would like to connect, please don't hesitate to reach out through the contact information provided. Thank you for visiting!</p>
      <div class="cta-row">
        <a href="projects.html" class="btn btn-primary">View Projects</a>
        <a href="files/resume.pdf" class="btn btn-outline" download>Download Resume</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="stat-grid">
        <div class="stat-box">
          <span class="stat-number">12,000</span>
          <span class="stat-label">Hours of Higher Education</span>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-box">
          <span class="stat-number">7</span>
          <span class="stat-label">Projects — and counting</span>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-box">
          <span class="stat-number">27%</span>
          <span class="stat-label">Of Data Analysts Are Female</span>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-box">
          <span class="stat-number">190 People</span>
          <span class="stat-label">Cohort I Represent</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="chip-row">
        <span class="chip">Python</span>
        <span class="chip">SQL</span>
        <span class="chip">Google Analytics</span>
        <span class="chip">Polars</span>
        <span class="chip">Pandas</span>
        <span class="chip">GenAI</span>
        <span class="chip">Tableau</span>
        <span class="chip">Power BI</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <hr class="section-hr">

  <!-- CURRENTLY -->
  <p class="section-label">Currently</p>

  <div class="now-card">
    <div class="now-header">
      <div class="now-live">
        <span class="live-dot"></span>
        <span class="live-label">Live</span>
      </div>
      <span class="now-date-badge">April 2026</span>
    </div>
    <div class="now-project">Petco Product Substitution Model</div>
    <div class="now-subtitle">MSBA Capstone · Industry Partner Project</div>
    <div class="now-fields">
      <div>
        <span class="now-field-label">Approach</span>
        <span class="now-field-value">Researching substitution literature to ground a model in customer behavior rather than product similarity alone.</span>
      </div>
      <div>
        <span class="now-field-label">Methodology</span>
        <span class="now-field-value">Collaborative research with Petco data scientists. Building toward a behavior-driven substitution recommendation framework.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="now-tags">
      <span class="now-tag accent-tag">Capstone</span>
      <span class="now-tag">ML</span>
      <span class="now-tag">SQL</span>
      <span class="now-tag">Substitution</span>
      <span class="now-tag">Literature Review</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <hr class="section-hr">

  <!-- EXPERIENCE -->
  <p class="section-label">Experience</p>

  <div class="timeline-entry">
    <div class="tl-date">Jun 2024 – Jul 2025</div>
    <div>
      <p class="tl-role">FP&amp;A Analyst</p>
      <p class="tl-org">Scientist.com</p>
      <p class="tl-desc">Liaison connecting data science, finance, and accounting teams across open-ended ad-hoc analytical projects, translating quantitative findings into actionable financial insights.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="timeline-entry">
    <div class="tl-date">Apr 2025 – Present</div>
    <div>
      <p class="tl-role">Marketing Analyst</p>
      <p class="tl-org">Mercury Insurance</p>
      <p class="tl-desc">Embedded in a cross-functional team to analyze the customer acquisition funnel — identifying conversion drop-off points, building reporting dashboards, and surfacing data-driven recommendations to optimize channel performance.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <hr class="section-hr">

  <!-- ARCHIVE -->
  <p class="section-label">Archive</p>

  <table class="archive-table">
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <th>Date</th>
        <th>Project</th>
        <th>Tags</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td>Early 2026</td>
        <td>Rent the Runway ML</td>
        <td class="archive-tags">NLP, scikit-learn</td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>

</div>
```
